title: Al-Isharat: Pointers and Reminders
description: Avicenna's mature philosophy: the distinction between essence and existence, the necessary being, and the emanation of the world.
introduction: Avicenna's mature philosophy: the distinction between essence and existence, the necessary being, and the emanation of the world.

translation.text: There must be a being whose existence is necessary in itself, not dependent on anything else. This being is God.
